title: Profile Summary
text: Anchana Prabakaran is a Data Analyst based in Chennai, India, with 2+ years of experience engineering data pipelines, migrating hundreds of SSRS reports to Databricks, and delivering Power BI dashboards that drive business decisions. She is comfortable across the full data stack: converting T-SQL to Databricks-compatible SQL, configuring ODBC connectors, and deploying DBT models through Azure DevOps CI/CD. She holds an active Databricks Certified Data Engineer Associate certification.

title: Current Role
text: Anchana's current role is Data Analyst at Indium Software Private Limited in Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India (Hybrid), since April 2026 (2.5+ years total professional experience). In this current position she is contributing to the final stretch of the SSRS-to-Databricks migration, converting transformation logic into DBT models and Databricks notebooks deployed through Azure DevOps CI/CD pipelines.

title: Work Experience Timeline
text: Anchana's career at Indium Software Private Limited progressed through three roles: (1) Graduate Engineering Trainee, Chennai (On-site), Oct 2023 - Sep 2024 - started her data journey learning SQL Server fundamentals, Power BI reporting, and the SSRS ecosystem, assisting with early dashboard builds and query support. (2) Junior Data Analyst, Tamil Nadu (On-site), Oct 2024 - Mar 2026 - played a key role in migrating 200-400 SSRS reports from SQL Server to Databricks, automating extraction of table references and T-SQL from .rdl files with Python, configuring ODBC connectivity, and validating query outputs. (3) Data Analyst (current role), Chennai (Hybrid), Apr 2026 - Present - contributing to the final stretch of the SSRS-to-Databricks migration while converting transformation logic into DBT models and Databricks notebooks deployed via Azure DevOps CI/CD.

title: Contact Information
text: Email: anchana.techie@gmail.com. LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/anchana-prabakaran-231331233. Based in Chennai, India.

title: Databricks Certification
text: Anchana holds the Databricks Certified Data Engineer Associate certification, issued June 1, 2026 and valid until June 1, 2028. It is currently active.

title: Project: Power BI Dashboard Development
text: Anchana designed and delivered multiple Power BI dashboards for business stakeholders, including Portfolio at Risk, Agent Productivity, Claims, and Insurance dashboards. She developed DAX measures and data models to support dynamic reporting and KPI tracking, and collaborated with business teams to gather requirements and translate them into actionable visual analytics.

title: Project: SSRS-to-Databricks Migration (200-400 Reports)
text: Anchana played a key role in the end-to-end migration of 200 to 400 SSRS reports from SQL Server to Databricks, converting embedded T-SQL to Databricks-compatible SQL. She automated extraction of table references and T-SQL queries from .rdl files using Python scripting, significantly reducing manual effort. She configured ODBC connectivity via the Simba Spark Driver and Databricks Personal Access Tokens to repoint reports to the new platform, validated query outputs between SQL Server and Databricks, classified discrepancies as data sync or logic issues, and resolved them to ensure accuracy post-migration.

title: Project: ETL Pipeline Development & DBT Deployment on Azure DevOps
text: Anchana converted existing T-SQL stored procedures into DBT models for Databricks, and rebuilt the remaining stored procedures as Databricks notebooks, restructuring transformation logic to process and structure raw data for downstream consumption. She deployed both the DBT models and notebooks through Azure DevOps CI/CD pipelines with full version control in the repository, and authored the Terraform configuration to provision and schedule the corresponding Databricks job.

title: Technical Skills and Expertise
text: Anchana specializes in data engineering, business intelligence, and analytics. Her expertise includes designing ETL pipelines, developing Power BI dashboards, migrating SSRS reports to Databricks, and building data transformation workflows. She is proficient in Python, SQL, Databricks, Power BI, DAX, DBT, Azure DevOps, SSRS, ODBC integration, CI/CD pipelines, and SQL Server.

title: Education
text: B.E. in Computer Science & Engineering from Meenakshi Sundararajan Engineering College, graduating First Class with Distinction with a CGPA of 8.84.

title: Additional Course Certifications
text: Anchana has completed course certifications in: Assertive Communication Skills Masterclass, Generative AI For Data Engineering, Intro to AI Agents and Agentic AI, Introduction to Data Engineering Using Generative AI, and RAG Strategy and Execution.

text: Anchana's resume is available on her portfolio site under the Resume section, viewable directly or downloadable as a document.

title: Beyond Work
text: Outside of her professional work, Anchana dedicates time to creative and physical pursuits that help her recharge. Her hobbies include painting and sketching, badminton, clay sculpting and pottery, and table tennis, each offering a different way to unwind and stay engaged beyond data and dashboards.

title: Beyond Work: Art & Painting
text: Drawing and painting give Anchana a quiet, creative outlet away from screens and spreadsheets. She enjoys experimenting with sketching, colour, and mixed media in her free time, and some of her artwork has been recognized in IGOT painting competitions.

title: Beyond Work: Badminton
text: Badminton is a racquet sport Anchana picked up as a way to stay active and sharpen her reflexes. She plays regularly with friends and colleagues on weekends, finding it a fast-paced, competitive way to relieve stress, and has taken part in tournaments.

title: Beyond Work: Clay Sculpting
text: Clay sculpting and pottery are a hands-on, tactile craft Anchana turns to when she wants to slow down and make something with her hands. She enjoys shaping and moulding clay into functional pieces such as vases and flasks, as well as smaller painted pieces.

title: Beyond Work: Table Tennis
text: Table tennis is one of Anchana's favourite ways to unwind, combining quick reflexes with friendly competition. She plays regularly with friends and family and has earned recognition in table tennis competitions, including a silver medal.

title: CSR & Community Service
text: Anchana is actively involved in corporate social responsibility (CSR) initiatives, taking part in community service activities focused on environmental sustainability and support for underprivileged communities. Her CSR involvement spans tree plantation drives, breakfast drives, educational and hygiene kit packaging, seed ball making, and school painting projects.

text: Anchana joined a community tree-plantation initiative aimed at increasing green cover in local neighbourhoods and raising awareness about environmental sustainability.

text: Anchana participated in a breakfast drive to support underprivileged communities, helping ensure they have access to nutritious meals.

text: Anchana assisted in packaging educational and hygiene kits for distribution to underprivileged communities, supporting access to essential school and hygiene supplies.

text: Anchana took part in a seed ball making workshop, an initiative promoting environmental conservation and sustainable gardening practices.
